title: K-200 Payload Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Payload Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-428-C. Revision: C. Type: procedure. Author: Rowan Ellery. Created: 2024-03-09. Last modified: 2024-12-14. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1148, P-1162.
